title: Ace of Hearts
description: This is the modpack is used for the Minecraft server the Ace of Hearts SMP. Join our Discord to learn more.
body: # Ace of Hearts SMP This is the official Ace of Hearts SMP mod pack! Ace of Hearts is a community of content creators collaborating into making a mysterious and adventurous lore with character development and story-lines. The server is whitelist only and a form must be submitted in order to apply. The form can be found on our Discord! # Accreditation This mod pack includes the Complementary Reimagined Shader Pack by EminGTR. Feel free to provide them any support of their creation's CurseForge page.
